title: Verilator does not pass tests on macosx
body:
---


Author Name: **Michael Perrott**
Original Redmine Issue: 388 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2011-09-12
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

```
making verilator in src
cd obj_dbg && make -j 1             TGT=../../verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Nothing to be done for `serial'.
cd obj_dbg && make  TGT=../../verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
       Compile flags:  g++ -I/usr/local/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -DYYDEBUG -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/Users/mhperrott/CppSim5_mac/CppSimShared/Verilator/verilator-3.820"
cd obj_opt && make -j 1             TGT=../../verilator_bin -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Nothing to be done for `serial'.
cd obj_opt && make  TGT=../../verilator_bin -f ../Makefile_obj
       Compile flags:  g++ -I/usr/local/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -DYYDEBUG -O -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMPERL_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/Users/mhperrott/CppSim5_mac/CppSimShared/Verilator/verilator-3.820"
/usr/bin/perl /Users/mhperrott/CppSim5_mac/CppSimShared/Verilator/verilator-3.820/test_c/../bin/verilator --debug --debugi 0 --gdbbt --no-dump-tree -V
/usr/libexec/gdb/gdb-i386-apple-darwin: unrecognized option `--batch-silent'
Use `/usr/libexec/gdb/gdb-i386-apple-darwin --help' for a complete list of options.
-Info: --gdbbt ignored: gdb doesn't seem to be working
	/Users/mhperrott/CppSim5_mac/CppSimShared/Verilator/verilator-3.820/test_c/../verilator_bin_dbg --debug --debugi 0 --gdbbt --no-dump-tree -V

Environment:

     VERILATOR_BIN      = 
/usr/bin/perl /Users/mhperrott/CppSim5_mac/CppSimShared/Verilator/verilator-3.820/test_c/../bin/verilator --debug --debugi 0 --gdbbt --no-dump-tree --cc -f /Users/mhperrott/CppSim5_mac/CppSimShared/Verilator/verilator-3.820/test_c/../test_v/input.vc top.v --trace
```
